documentTypes.label: Pracharaka Referral Agreement
documentTypes.description: Signed agreement between Sadaika and the Pracharaka outlining referral terms and commission.

documentTypes.label: Patient Informed Consent Form
documentTypes.description: Written consent for Panchakarma treatment, risks, and data processing.

documentTypes.label: Treatment Plan Document
documentTypes.description: Detailed Panchakarma protocol signed by the Ayurveda doctor.

documentTypes.label: Blood Investigation Reports
documentTypes.description: CBC, LFT, RFT, fasting glucose and lipid profile.

documentTypes.label: Government Photo ID
documentTypes.description: Aadhaar / Passport / Driving License for identity verification.

documentTypes.label: Payment Receipt
documentTypes.description: Acknowledged receipt of advance deposit and balance payment.

documentTypes.label: Travel Itinerary
documentTypes.description: Flight / train booking confirmation for arrival coordination.

documentTypes.label: Admission Form
documentTypes.description: Completed in-centre admission form signed by patient and admitting doctor.

documentTypes.label: Astro-Eligibility Report
documentTypes.description: Signed eligibility assessment by the Ayurveda doctor.

documentTypes.label: QC Outcome Report
documentTypes.description: Post-program quality review and clinical outcomes documentation.

documentTypes.label: Orientation Kit Acknowledgement
documentTypes.description: Patient's signed/digital acknowledgement of receiving orientation materials.
